action.stageCommitTitle: Stage all local changes and commit them.
backup.reminder: This workspace is not backed up to PuppyOne Cloud.
cloud.downloadTitle: Download the latest changes from PuppyOne Cloud. Local edits are preserved automatically.
cloud.resolveBeforeDownload: Resolve local conflicts before downloading cloud changes.
cloud.upToDate: Cloud is already up to date.
cloud.updateCount: {count, plural, one {# update available} other {# updates available}}
commit.filesChanged: {count, plural, one {# file changed} other {# files changed}}
commit.noFileChanges: No file changes in this commit.
committed.ready: {count, plural, one {# local commit ready} other {# local commits ready}}: {action}.
aiChanges.moreFiles: {count, plural, one {+# more file} other {+# more files}}
diff.binary.noSemanticDiff: No specialized semantic diff is available for this format yet.
diff.changeStats: {additions, plural, one {# addition} other {# additions}}, {deletions, plural, one {# deletion} other {# deletions}}
diff.docx.block.heading: Heading
diff.docx.blocksChanged: {count, plural, one {# changed block} other {# changed blocks}}
diff.docx.fidelity.bodyTextV1: Content diff covers body paragraphs, headings, list items, and table-cell text. Styling, pagination, comments, headers, footers, and tracked-change fidelity are not compared.
diff.docx.noParagraphChanges: No paragraph or table text changes were detected.
diff.docx.truncated: Additional changes were omitted by the safety budget.
diff.docx.unavailableDetail: Unable to build the Word diff: {detail}
diff.truncatedCount: Diff truncated. {count, plural, one {# more line hidden.} other {# more lines hidden.}}
empty.initializeDetail: Initialize a Git repository to start tracking changes in this workspace.
empty.notControlled: This folder is not under source control.
history.firstCommit: The first commit on {branch} will appear here.
history.initialize: Initialize a repository to start history.
history.title: History
initial.cleanDetail: Add files to this workspace to start history.
initial.description: {workspace} has a Git repository, but no commits have been created yet. {detail}
initial.notStagedDetail: Stage the files you want to include.
initial.readyDetail: Write a message in the sidebar and commit.
status.limit: Showing the first {count} changes. Refine ignored files or open a smaller workspace for complete results.
setup.description: Keep a history of changes in this workspace and make it easy to work together.
setup.title: Version Control
sync.backupLocalBranch: {branch} is local only. Back it up with PuppyOne Cloud.
sync.chooseBeforePull: Choose a sync target before pulling.
sync.chooseBeforePush: Choose a sync target before pushing.
sync.cloudBackupEnabled: PuppyOne Cloud backup is enabled in .puppyone/config.json.
sync.cloudBranchMissing: Cloud branch does not exist yet.
sync.cloudCommitsOn: {count, plural, one {# cloud commit} other {# cloud commits}} on {target}.
sync.commitBeforePublish: Create a local commit before publishing.
sync.commitBeforePush: Create a local commit before pushing.
sync.commitThenPull: Commit locally first, then pull remote changes before pushing.
sync.commitThenPush: Commit staged changes, then push to {target}.
sync.commitsOn: {count, plural, one {# commit} other {# commits}} on {target}.
sync.committedWaiting: {count, plural, one {# committed change waiting} other {# committed changes waiting}}.
sync.configureBeforePull: Configure a Git remote before pulling.
sync.configureBeforePush: Configure a Git remote before pushing.
sync.configureCloudRemote: Configure a PuppyOne Cloud remote before syncing.
sync.connectRemote: Connect a remote to sync this workspace.
sync.downloadFrom: Download {count, plural, one {# commit} other {# commits}} from {target}.
sync.incomingOutgoing: {incoming, plural, one {# incoming} other {# incoming}}, {outgoing, plural, one {# outgoing} other {# outgoing}}
sync.initializeThenCloud: Initialize a repository, then create a PuppyOne Cloud backup.
sync.localReady: {count, plural, one {# local commit ready} other {# local commits ready}} to {action}.
sync.localWaiting: {count, plural, one {# local commit waiting} other {# local commits waiting}}.
sync.noConfiguredRemote: Cloud backup is enabled, but no Git remote is configured.
sync.primaryRemote: {remote} is configured as the primary remote.
sync.pullBeforeSend: Pull {count, plural, one {# remote commit} other {# remote commits}} before {action}.
sync.pullCount: Pull {count, plural, one {# commit} other {# commits}}
sync.pullFrom: Pull {count, plural, one {# commit} other {# commits}} from {target}.
sync.remoteBranchMissing: Remote branch does not exist yet.
sync.remoteCommitsOn: {count, plural, one {# remote commit} other {# remote commits}} on {target}.
sync.remoteReady: {count, plural, one {# remote commit ready} other {# remote commits ready}} to pull from {target}.
sync.resolveTitle: This branch has local and remote commits. Resolve divergence with merge or rebase before syncing.
sync.sendDiverged: {action} {count, plural, one {# local commit} other {# local commits}} to {target}. The remote also has incoming commits, so Git may reject this operation until you pull or resolve the divergence.
sync.sendTo: {action} {count, plural, one {# commit} other {# commits}} to {target}.
sync.uploadTo: Upload {count, plural, one {# commit} other {# commits}} to {target}.
dialog.discard.count: Discard local changes in {count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}}? This cannot be undone.
dialog.discard.path: Discard local changes in {path}? This cannot be undone.
dialog.error.detail: Copy the fix prompt into Codex or Claude Code if you want an agent to repair it.
dialog.error.title: Git Operation Failed
dialog.switch.changeCount: {count, plural, one {local change} other {local changes}} in this workspace.
dialog.switch.detail: Switching to {branch} may overwrite your current changes.
dialog.switch.note: Commit them to history, or stash them temporarily before switching.
dialog.switch.stashFailed: Could not stash changes. Review the changes and try again.
dialog.switch.title: Switch Branch?
error.checkout-overwrite: Cannot switch branch because local changes would be overwritten. Commit or stash your changes before switching branches.
error.checkout-worktree: Cannot switch branch because that branch is already checked out in another worktree.
error.checkout-not-found: Cannot find that branch. Fetch remotes and try again.
error.pull-diverged: Cannot pull or download changes because local commits and the remote branch have diverged. Rebase local commits onto the remote branch, then try again.
error.pull: Cannot pull or download remote changes.
error.push-rejected: Cannot push or upload because the remote branch has changes that are not local yet. Pull or download remote changes first, then try again.
error.commit-push-rejected: Committed locally, but push or upload failed because the remote branch has changes that are not local yet. Pull or download remote changes first, then try again.
error.commit-push: Cannot commit and push or upload changes.
error.cloud-backup: Cannot create a PuppyOne Cloud backup.
error.discard-selection: Select a changed file to discard, or use Discard All.
error.commit-push-no-remote: Connect a Git remote before committing and pushing.
error.commit-push-needs-pull: Pull remote changes before committing and pushing.
error.workspace-not-repository: The current workspace is not a Git repository.
error.previewBranchUnavailable: Cannot preview this diff because the comparison branch is not available locally. Fetch remote changes and try again.
error.previewNoCommonHistory: Cannot preview this diff because the local and remote branches do not share a common history. Pull with a merge or rebase strategy, then try again.
prompt.intro: I am using PuppyOne Desktop and a Git operation failed.
prompt.request: Please diagnose the Git state and propose the safest fix. Do not run destructive commands such as reset, clean, or force-push unless you explicitly explain the data-loss risk and ask for confirmation first.
